name: Ω-AUTO²-T / Automatisation de l'Automatisation de Tristan
core_axiom: Every repeated friction can become a workflow genome only after intent, permissions, dry-run, rollback, telemetry, and human sovereignty gates are explicit.
cvcd_invariants: rollback or compensation path is required
m_minus: Zero-touch must never mean zero-control; the more sensitive the actuator, the stronger the gate.
notes: The external-action layer must be sovereignty-first, reversible-first and proof-of-execution-first.
